pages.text:
§6§lELDER'S
    ANECDOTE§r

§7§oWelcome, traveler.
Sit by my fire awhile,
and let an old soul
share what little
wisdom he has found...§r

§8— The Village Elder

§6§lThe Four Gifts§r

§7§oThis land rewards
those who work it.

Whether you mine the
deeps, fish the waters,
tend the fields, or
face the wild beasts —
treasure finds those
who persist.§r

§6§lOf Dreams§r

§7§oWe all dream, child.
But some dream more
vividly than others.

The brighter your
dreams burn within,
the more the world
seems to... notice you.
And gift you in kind.§r

§6§lBrightening Dreams§r

§7§oI've seen crystals
that amplify dreams.
Rabbit feet blessed
by strange magic.
Potions that taste
like hope.

Seek them. Let your
dreams grow.§r

§6§lAncient Relics§r

§7§oHundreds of artifacts
scattered across this
land. Weapons of
legend. Armor blessed
by forgotten powers.
Trinkets that hum
with quiet magic.

Find them. Collect
them. Learn them.§r

§6§lLoyal Spirits§r

§7§oSpirits wait in
treasure chests to
bond with you. Some
common as house cats.
Others mythical —
dragons, phoenixes,
beings from beyond.

They grow alongside
you.§r

§6§lThe Armor of Myths§r

§7§oFive legendary sets
of armor exist, they
say. Dragon fire.
Ocean depths. Living
nature. The miner's
journey. The explorer's
path.

Gather them, and
become legend.§r

§6§lSafe Travels§r

§7§oHorns that call to
friends across any
distance. Dials bound
to lodestones. Hubs
that connect worlds.

The old magic still
works for those who
know how to use it.

§8Dream well, traveler.§r
